content.summary: leworldmodel Lucas Maes (@lucasmaes_) JEPA are finally easy to train end-to-end without any tricks! Excited to introduce LeWorldModel: a stable, end-to-end JEPA that learns world models directly from pixels, no heuristics. 15M params, 1 GPU, and full planning <1 second. 📑: le-wm.github.io Video — https://nitter.net/lucasmaes_/status/2036080584569618741#m

Post title: leworldmodel

Post summary: leworldmodel Lucas Maes (@lucasmaes_) JEPA are finally easy to train end-to-end without any tricks! Excited to introduce LeWorldModel: a stable, end-to-end JEPA that learns world models directly from pixels, no heuristics. 15M params, 1 GPU, and full planning <1 second. 📑: le-wm.github.io Video — https://nitter.net/lucasmaes_/status/2036080584569618741#m
